response.overview: Aiden awakes, but when he does he is no longer in his normal world. He is confined to a comic book. He must confront his past to make it out and right his wrongs, before the darker side of him takes over. A story told in two parts four years apart, in which throughout the years he gains perspective to help him defeat the darkness once and for all.
response.tagline: You cant lock up the darkness. But you can punch it really hard.
response.title: Trapped in a Comic Book
